jobs.name: daily-hermes-self-update-review
jobs.prompt:
You are running a daily read-only Hermes self-update review for Bank.

Work only against this repo: /home/tphat/.hermes/hermes-agent
Primary branch: main
Timezone for summaries: Asia/Bangkok
Exact approval phrase: approve hermes self-update

Goal: summarize upstream updates and generate an approval card. This cron run is STRICTLY read-only.

Do NOT:
- modify files
- switch branches
- stash
- pull, merge, or rebase
- commit or push
- install packages

Required workflow:
1. cd into /home/tphat/.hermes/hermes-agent
2. Collect baseline state:
   - git rev-parse --short HEAD
   - git branch --show-current
   - git status --short --branch
3. Fetch upstream without changing local files:
   - git fetch origin main --prune
4. Compute ahead/behind counts between local HEAD and origin/main
5. If upstream is ahead, summarize up to 10 commits from HEAD..origin/main using short SHA, subject, author, and relative date. Call out likely breaking/config/migration/tooling changes.
6. If no upstream commits are ahead, say so clearly.
7. Always report whether the working tree is clean or dirty, including modified/untracked files.
8. If local commits exist ahead of upstream, call that out explicitly.
9. End with heading: ## Approval card

In the approval card include:
- Status: waiting for Bank
- current branch
- current local commit
- ahead/behind counts
- clean/dirty state
- short "If approved later in chat, I will" list
- exact reply phrase: approve hermes self-update
- warning that no update will be applied until Bank approves in chat

In the "If approved later in chat, I will" list, explicitly say the approved update workflow must:
- re-check repo state before writing
- create a backup branch at the pre-update HEAD
- update safely while preserving local work
- run targeted verification for touched areas
- commit any Hermes-made conflict resolutions or follow-up changes with a conventional commit instead of leaving them uncommitted
- report exactly what changed

Do not apply the update in this cron run. Only review and prepare the approval card.
